meta.title: DEF CON 33 - From Pwn to Plan: Turning Physical Exploits Into Upgrades - Shawn
meta.description: Everyone loves breaking in—but that’s just step 7 out of 10. This session explores what it really takes to run a physical pen test that's not just exciting, but also safe, smart, and worth the money for your company or client. We'll follow the full journey - from breach-focused OSINT and recon, to delivering findings that teams act on. Expect war stories, dumb mistakes, and smart takeaways as you learn how to turn a good break-in into a lasting impact.
